response.text: The packet reports a conflict between README.md and docs/architecture.md about the hold lifetime. The enforced behavior lives in code, so I'll locate the constant that pins it.
The constant is declared in internal/booking/hold.go. I'll read the file to confirm the enforced value and how it is applied.

The enforced hold lifetime is 30 minutes: internal/booking/hold.go pins HoldTTLMinutes to 30 and ExpiresAt applies it. docs/architecture.md states the same 30-minute lifetime, so it matches the enforced behavior. README.md states that holds expire after 15 minutes, which disagrees with the enforced behavior; it is the only document statement that needs correction. No files were modified.
